content_en:
Furthermore, the Siwak does not completely remove the odor of the mouth for the fasting person because its reason still remains, that is, the stomach being empty of food. Only the effect of this fact will be lessened from the teeth and gums.

——_ The Prophetic Medicine

The Prophet b taught his nation the preferred and the disliked acts of the Fast. He did not mention the Siwak among the disliked acts although he knew they were using it. Rather, he encouraged them in general to use the Siwak and they saw him using it himself at innumerable times, knowing that they would imitate him. Never did he discourage them from using the Siwak in the afternoon (when they are fasting). It is a fact that the Prophet “g is required to offer the religious ruling when it is needed,

There is a weak Hadith that narrates that the Prophet as encouraged the Muslim to drink cow milk, because it is a remedy and because the butter of that milk is a cure, while stating that cow meat is an ailment, The chain of narrators for this Hadith is not authentic.

Somn is hot and wet in the first degree, it is mild, and helps eliminate the various tumors that attack the soft parts of the body. Somn is stronger than butter as a maturing agent, Galinus said that he used shortening to cure the tumors that occur in the ear and the tip of the nose. In addition, when the base of the teeth is anointed with shortening, the teeth will emerge faster.

When shortening is blended with honey and bitter almonds, it will clear the chest and the lungs and will dissipate various ailments; Shortening is harmful for the

stomach, especially if the person has a mucus condition.

When the shortening made of cow and goat milk is mixed with honey, it helps against toxic materials and snake and scorpion stings. [bn As-Sunni mentioned that ‘Ali said that the people nev+r use a better remedy than shortening.

Imam Ahmad and Ibn Majah narrated that ‘Abdullah Ibn 'Umar said that the Prophet b said:

"We were allowed two dead animals and two bloods: fish and locust, and liver and spleen."

There are many kinds offish, the best of which is the most delicious, the best scented, moderate in size, which has fine scales, the softest meat, which live in fresh water that flows on pebbles and which eat plants and not organic waste. The best areas for the fish to live are those with the freshest water that runs through rocks, then the areas that have sandy ground void of filth or wastes and which are mildly calm and exposed to the sun and wind,

Sea fish are In addition soft and delicious. The meat of sea fish that has soft skin is cold and wet, difficult to digest and produces excessive amounts of phlegm, but In addition produce acceptable temperament, increase

——— The Prophetic Medicine semen production and fertility and suit hot conditions.

The best kind of salted fish is the most recently salted. Salted fish is hot and dry, and the older they get the hotter and drier they become. Silurid (similar to catfish) is very viscous, and the Jews do not eat this type of fish. Yet, soft Silurid meat softens the stomach, and when it is salted, kept and then eaten, it will clear the windpipe and make the voice finer. When it is ground and used as an external ointment, it will extract the wastes that accumulate inside the body, as it has the quality of extracting such substances,

Sitting in the salty water of Silurid relives the effects of newly formed ulcers and extracts the harmful substances to the surface. Salty water of Silurid In addition relieves sciatic nerve ailment when one is injected with it.

The best part of fish meat is closer to the tail, and the soft and fatty fish meat produces fatness and flesh.

In the Sahihain it is In addition narrated that Jabir bin Abdullah said, "The Prophet b sent us with three hundred riders under the leadership of Abu 'Ubaidah bin Al-Jarrah. We went by the seashore and were soon very hungry until we ate tree leaves. The sea then threw out a whale that is called 'Anbar. We ate from it for a half a month and In addition used its fat in our food. Abu

Ubaidah then took a rib of the fish and asked a man to ride on his camel and then pass under the rib, which he easily did.”

Al-Tirmidhi and Abu Dawud narrated that Umm Al-Munthir said, "The Messenger of Allah b came by along with Ali when he was still recovering from an illness. Then, we had some hanging clusters of dates. The Messenger of Allah b started eating from it, and he (Ali) joined him. The Messenger of Allah b then said to him:

"You are still recuperating, until ‘Ali stopped eating.' I then made some barley with chard and brought it to them. The Prophet b said, to 'Ali 'Eat from this: this more beneficial for you.”

Silgh is hot and dry in the first degree and has a soothing coofness in it. Chard In addition decomposes and opens the clogs. The black chard constipates and helps against alopecia (A skin disease characterized by loss of hair, partial or total), spots, dandruff and warts if its water is used as ointment. It In addition kills lice and is used as ointment when blended with honey to cure herpes. Silgh In addition opens the clogs in the liver and spleen.

The black chard constipates as we have stated, especially when taken with lentils, both of which are not

—— The Prophetic Medicine

suitable for the stomach. However, white chard with lentils softens the stomach and is used as a laxative and is used to treat hemiplegia (Paralysis affecting only one side of the body), when blended with food aliments and condiments. Yet, it is not nutritious, produces harmful mixtures and burns the blood. Eating it with vinegar and mustard helps neutralize these side effects. Finally, eating it excessively causes constipation and flatulence.

The Letter Shin 1. Shuneiz (The Black Seed)

We talked about the Black Seed before under the letter "Hoo.

Al-Tirmidhi and Ibn Majah narrated that the Messenger of Allah b asked Asma' bint 'Umais

"How do you treat constipation? She said. ‘with Shubrum'. The Prophet its said, 'Hot and too strong of a laxative."

Shubrum is a small tree that sometimes grows to be as tall as a man. The Shubrum has red branches with some whiteness, while the tips of its branches end with a cluster of leaves, Shubrum flowers are small and

yellowish with some whiteness. When its flowers they fall small stems that have small grains and which look like terebinth replace them. The color of these stems is reddish and has red peels that cover its ribs. The parts of the Shubrum that are used are its peels, ribs and stem extract,

Shubrum is hot and dry in the fourth degree and drives away the black bile, yellow water and phlegm. It In addition causes nausea and distress. Using it in excessive amounts might even case death. When intending to use the Shubrum, it should first be soaked in milk for a day and a night, and the milk should be changed twice or thrice during the day. Then, the Shubrum should be dried in the shadow, blended with roses, tragacanth (In addition known as goats' horn), and then consumed with honey water or grape juice.

Two to four small measures of the Shubrum constitute one dose. We should state that Hunain said, "As for Shubrum milk, I do not see any goodness in it and thus do not recommend it. Common doctors have killed many people with it."

Ibn Majah narrated that "Aishah said: "When a member of the family of the Messenger of Allah b would fall sick, he would order that barley soup is made and then the ill person wouid be commanded to have some of it. He

——— The Prophetic Medicine

used to say, 'It strengthens the heart of the sad person and relieves the heart of the ill person, just as one of you would wash the dirt off of her face with water.’ "

We mentioned that the remedy mentioned in this Hadith entails boiled barley water which is more nutritious than its flour. Barley water helps against coughing and throat roughness, relieves the irritant excess excrement, produces more urine, cleanses the stomach, quenches the thirst and extinguishes heat. It In addition provides comfort and has a decomposing quality.

This remedy entails preparing a portion of a good type of barley and five times as much water, placing them in a clean pot and cooking them under moderate temperature until only two fifths of the mixture remains in the pot. The resulting soup is then purified and used as much as needed.

4. Shown (Roasted Meat)

Allah said that when Prophet Ibrahim had the honorable guests:

"And he hastened to entertain them with a roasted calf." (I 1:69) Ibrahim had roasted the calf on heated stones.

Al-Tirmidhi narrated that Umm Salamah said that

she once brought the Prophet s& a roasted piece of meat and that he ate from it and then stood up to pray without repeating the ablution. Al-Tirmidhi then commented that this /adith is authentic. Al-Tirmidhi In addition narrated that Abdullah bin AI-Harith said, "We ate some roasted meat with the Messenger of Allah as inside the mosque." Further, Al-Tirmidhi narrated that Al-Mughirah bin Shu'bah said, "I was a guest of the Messenger of Allah b one night and he ordered that a piece of meat be roasted and then took the blade and started to cut pieces of it for me. Then, Bilal came to make the call to prayer and the Prophet s& dropped the blade and said, 'What is the matter with him?"

The best type of roast is the meat of a one-year old sheep, then a fat sheep. This type of food is hot and wet, produces black bile, but is one of the most nutritious foods for healthy, ill and recovering persons alike. Cooked meat is better, lighter on the stomach and has more wetness. Fried meat is less beneficial while meat dried in the sun is the worst kind. In addition, roasting meat on burning stones is better than flame broiled meats.

5. Sha'hm (Fat or Grease)

In Al-Musnad it is narrated that Anas said that a Jewish man asked the Prophet ste to be his guest and that he offered him some barley bread and melted grease.

——— The Prophetic Medicine

In the Sahih it is In addition narrated that Abdullah bin Mughaffal said, "On the Day of Khaibar, a bag full of grease was lowered and | took possession of it and said, 'By Allah! I will not give anyone any of it!' When I tured around | found that the Messenger of Allah “ was laughing and did not comment.'"
content_id:
Selain itu, Siwak tidak sepenuhnya menghilangkan bau mulut orang yang berpuasa karena penyebabnya masih ada, yaitu perut yang kosong dari makanan. Hanya saja efek dari kondisi ini akan berkurang dari gigi dan gusi.

——_ Pengobatan Nabawi

Nabi ﷺ mengajarkan kepada umatnya perbuatan-perbuatan yang dianjurkan dan yang dibenci dalam puasa. Beliau tidak menyebut Siwak di antara perbuatan yang dibenci, meskipun beliau tahu mereka menggunakannya. Bahkan, beliau menganjurkan mereka secara umum untuk menggunakan Siwak dan mereka melihat beliau menggunakannya sendiri pada waktu yang tak terhitung, sambil mengetahui bahwa mereka akan meneladaninya. Beliau tidak pernah melarang mereka menggunakan Siwak di sore hari (saat mereka berpuasa). Merupakan suatu fakta bahwa Nabi ﷺ wajib menyampaikan hukum agama ketika diperlukan.

Terdapat sebuah hadith yang lemah yang menceritakan bahwa Nabi ﷺ menganjurkan kaum Muslim untuk meminum susu sapi, karena ia adalah obat dan karena mentega dari susu tersebut adalah penyembuh, sambil menyatakan bahwa daging sapi adalah penyakit. Sanad hadith ini tidak shahih.

Samn bersifat panas dan basah pada tingkat pertama, ia ringan, dan membantu menghilangkan berbagai tumor yang menyerang bagian-bagian lunak tubuh. Samn lebih kuat daripada mentega sebagai agen pematang. Galinus mengatakan bahwa ia menggunakan lemak untuk mengobati tumor yang terjadi di telinga dan ujung hidung. Selain itu, ketika pangkal gigi diolesi dengan lemak, gigi akan tumbuh lebih cepat.

Ketika lemak dicampur dengan madu dan almond pahit, ia akan membersihkan dada dan paru-paru serta menghilangkan berbagai penyakit. Lemak berbahaya bagi

lambung, terutama jika seseorang memiliki kondisi berlendir.

Ketika lemak yang terbuat dari susu sapi dan kambing dicampur dengan madu, ia membantu melawan bahan-bahan beracun serta sengatan ular dan kalajengking. Ibn As-Sunni menyebutkan bahwa 'Ali berkata bahwa manusia tidak pernah menggunakan obat yang lebih baik daripada lemak.

Imam Ahmad dan Ibn Majah meriwayatkan bahwa 'Abdullah Ibn 'Umar berkata bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda:

"Kami dihalalkan dua bangkai dan dua darah: ikan dan belalang, serta hati dan limpa."

Ada banyak jenis ikan, yang terbaik adalah yang paling lezat, paling harum, berukuran sedang, bersisik halus, dagingnya paling lembut, yang hidup di air tawar yang mengalir di atas kerikil dan yang memakan tumbuhan dan bukan limbah organik. Daerah terbaik bagi ikan untuk hidup adalah yang airnya paling segar dan mengalir melalui bebatuan, kemudian daerah yang memiliki dasar berpasir, bebas dari kotoran atau limbah, serta agak tenang dan terpapar sinar matahari dan angin.

Ikan laut juga lembut dan lezat. Daging ikan laut yang berkulit lembut bersifat dingin dan basah, sulit dicerna dan menghasilkan dahak dalam jumlah berlebihan, namun juga menghasilkan temperamen yang baik, meningkatkan

——— Pengobatan Nabawi produksi sperma dan kesuburan serta cocok untuk kondisi panas.

Jenis ikan asin terbaik adalah yang paling baru diasinkan. Ikan asin bersifat panas dan kering, dan semakin tua semakin panas dan kering. Ikan lele sangat berlendir, dan orang-orang Yahudi tidak memakan jenis ikan ini. Namun, daging lele yang lembut melunakkan lambung, dan ketika diasinkan, disimpan lalu dimakan, ia akan membersihkan saluran pernapasan dan memperindah suara. Ketika digiling dan digunakan sebagai salep luar, ia akan mengeluarkan limbah yang menumpuk di dalam tubuh, karena ia memiliki kualitas untuk menarik keluar zat-zat semacam itu.

Berendam dalam air asin ikan lele meringankan efek bisul yang baru terbentuk dan menarik keluar zat-zat berbahaya ke permukaan. Air asin ikan lele juga meringankan penyakit saraf siatik ketika disuntikkan.

Bagian terbaik dari daging ikan adalah yang lebih dekat ke ekor, dan daging ikan yang lembut dan berlemak menghasilkan kegemukan dan pembentukan daging.

Dalam Shahihain juga diriwayatkan bahwa Jabir bin Abdullah berkata, "Nabi ﷺ mengutus kami bersama tiga ratus penunggang kuda di bawah pimpinan Abu 'Ubaidah bin Al-Jarrah. Kami berjalan di tepi laut dan segera sangat kelaparan hingga kami memakan dedaunan pohon. Laut kemudian melemparkan seekor paus yang disebut 'Anbar. Kami memakannya selama setengah bulan dan juga menggunakan lemaknya dalam makanan kami. Abu

'Ubaidah kemudian mengambil tulang rusuk ikan tersebut dan meminta seorang laki-laki untuk mengendarai untanya lalu melewati di bawah tulang rusuk tersebut, dan ia berhasil melakukannya dengan mudah."

Al-Tirmidhi dan Abu Dawud meriwayatkan bahwa Umm Al-Munthir berkata, "Rasulullah ﷺ datang bersama Ali ketika ia masih dalam masa pemulihan dari sakit. Kemudian, kami memiliki beberapa tandan kurma yang menggantung. Rasulullah ﷺ mulai memakannya, dan Ali pun ikut memakannya. Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian berkata kepadanya:

"Engkau masih dalam masa pemulihan, hingga 'Ali berhenti makan.' Aku kemudian membuat sedikit jelai dengan daun bit dan membawanya kepada mereka. Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada 'Ali, 'Makanlah dari ini: ini lebih bermanfaat bagimu.'"

Silgh bersifat panas dan kering pada tingkat pertama dan memiliki kesejukan yang menenangkan di dalamnya. Daun bit juga menguraikan dan membuka sumbatan. Daun bit hitam menyebabkan sembelit dan membantu melawan alopesia (penyakit kulit yang ditandai dengan kerontokan rambut, sebagian atau total), bercak, ketombe dan kutil jika airnya digunakan sebagai salep. Ia juga membunuh kutu dan digunakan sebagai salep ketika dicampur dengan madu untuk mengobati herpes. Silgh juga membuka sumbatan di hati dan limpa.

Daun bit hitam menyebabkan sembelit sebagaimana telah kami sebutkan, terutama ketika dimakan bersama kacang lentil, keduanya tidak

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

cocok untuk lambung. Namun, daun bit putih bersama lentil melunakkan lambung dan digunakan sebagai pencahar serta digunakan untuk mengobati hemiplegia (kelumpuhan yang hanya mempengaruhi satu sisi tubuh), ketika dicampur dengan bahan makanan dan bumbu. Namun demikian, ia tidak bergizi, menghasilkan campuran yang berbahaya dan membakar darah. Memakannya bersama cuka dan mustard membantu menetralisir efek samping ini. Akhirnya, mengonsumsinya secara berlebihan menyebabkan sembelit dan kembung.

Huruf Syin 1. Shuneiz (Biji Hitam)

Kami telah membahas tentang Biji Hitam sebelumnya di bawah huruf "Ha".

Al-Tirmidhi dan Ibn Majah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya kepada Asma' binti 'Umais:

"Bagaimana engkau mengobati sembelit?" Ia berkata, "Dengan Shubrum." Nabi ﷺ bersabda, "Panas dan terlalu kuat sebagai pencahar."

Shubrum adalah pohon kecil yang terkadang tumbuh setinggi manusia. Shubrum memiliki cabang-cabang merah dengan sedikit warna putih, sementara ujung cabang-cabangnya berakhir dengan sekumpulan daun. Bunga Shubrum kecil dan

berwarna kekuningan dengan sedikit warna putih. Ketika bunganya rontok, batang-batang kecil yang memiliki butiran-butiran kecil dan menyerupai pohon terebint menggantikannya. Warna batang-batang ini kemerahan dan memiliki kulit merah yang menutupi tulang-tulangnya. Bagian Shubrum yang digunakan adalah kulit, tulang, dan ekstrak batangnya.

Shubrum bersifat panas dan kering pada tingkat keempat serta mengusir empedu hitam, air kuning, dan dahak. Ia juga menyebabkan mual dan kepayahan. Penggunaannya dalam jumlah berlebihan bahkan dapat menyebabkan kematian. Ketika hendak menggunakan Shubrum, ia harus terlebih dahulu direndam dalam susu selama sehari semalam, dan susu harus diganti dua atau tiga kali dalam sehari. Kemudian, Shubrum harus dikeringkan di tempat teduh, dicampur dengan mawar, tragacanth (juga dikenal sebagai tanduk kambing), lalu dikonsumsi bersama air madu atau sari anggur.

Dua hingga empat takaran kecil Shubrum merupakan satu dosis. Perlu kami sebutkan bahwa Hunain berkata, "Adapun susu Shubrum, saya tidak melihat kebaikan apapun di dalamnya dan dengan demikian tidak menganjurkannya. Para dokter awam telah membunuh banyak orang dengannya."

Ibn Majah meriwayatkan bahwa 'Aisyah berkata: "Ketika salah seorang anggota keluarga Rasulullah ﷺ jatuh sakit, beliau memerintahkan agar sup jelai dibuat, kemudian orang yang sakit diperintahkan untuk meminumnya. Beliau

——— Pengobatan Nabawi

biasa berkata, 'Ia menguatkan hati orang yang bersedih dan meringankan hati orang yang sakit, sebagaimana salah seorang dari kalian membersihkan kotoran dari wajahnya dengan air.'"

Kami telah menyebutkan bahwa obat yang disebutkan dalam hadith ini mencakup air jelai rebus yang lebih bergizi daripada tepungnya. Air jelai membantu melawan batuk dan kekasar

4. Shawi (Daging Panggang)

Allah berfirman bahwa ketika Nabi Ibrahim mendapat tamu-tamu yang mulia:

"Dan dia segera menjamu mereka dengan daging anak sapi yang dipanggang." (11:69) Ibrahim telah memanggang anak sapi di atas batu-batu yang dipanaskan.

Al-Tirmidhi meriwayatkan bahwa Umm Salamah berkata bahwa

ia pernah membawakan kepada Nabi ﷺ sepotong daging panggang, dan beliau memakannya kemudian berdiri untuk shalat tanpa mengulangi wudhu. Al-Tirmidhi kemudian berkomentar bahwa hadith ini shahih. Al-Tirmidhi juga meriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin Al-Harith berkata, "Kami makan daging panggang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di dalam masjid." Selanjutnya, Al-Tirmidhi meriwayatkan bahwa Al-Mughirah bin Shu'bah berkata, "Aku pernah menjadi tamu Rasulullah ﷺ suatu malam, dan beliau memerintahkan agar sepotong daging dipanggang, lalu mengambil pisau dan mulai memotongkan bagian-bagiannya untukku. Kemudian Bilal datang untuk mengumandangkan adzan, dan Nabi ﷺ meletakkan pisau itu sambil berkata, 'Ada apa dengannya?'"

Jenis panggang terbaik adalah daging domba berumur satu tahun, kemudian domba yang gemuk. Jenis makanan ini bersifat panas dan lembap, menghasilkan empedu hitam, namun merupakan salah satu makanan paling bergizi bagi orang sehat, sakit, maupun yang sedang dalam pemulihan. Daging yang direbus lebih baik, lebih ringan di perut, dan memiliki lebih banyak kandungan air. Daging yang digoreng kurang bermanfaat, sedangkan daging yang dikeringkan di bawah sinar matahari adalah jenis yang paling buruk. Selain itu, memanggang daging di atas batu yang dipanaskan lebih baik daripada dipanggang langsung di atas api.

5. Sha'hm (Lemak atau Gajih)

Dalam Al-Musnad diriwayatkan bahwa Anas berkata bahwa seorang lelaki Yahudi mengundang Nabi ﷺ untuk menjadi tamunya dan menyajikan kepadanya roti jelai dan gajih yang dicairkan.

——— Thibb Nabawi

Dalam Shahih juga diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin Mughaffal berkata, "Pada Hari Khaibar, sebuah kantong penuh gajih diturunkan dan aku mengambil kepemilikannya sambil berkata, 'Demi Allah! Aku tidak akan memberikan sedikit pun dari ini kepada siapapun!' Ketika aku berbalik, aku mendapati Rasulullah ﷺ sedang tertawa dan tidak berkomentar apa pun.'"

النبي ﷺ b taught his nation the preferred and the disliked acts of the Fast. He did not mention the Siwak among the disliked acts although he knew they were using it. Ubaidah then took a rib of the fish and asked a man to ride on his camel and then pass under the rib, which he easily did.”

Al-Tirmidhi and Abu Dawud narrated that Umm Al-Munthir said, "رسول الله ﷺ b came by along with Ali when he was still recovering from an illness. Then, we had some hanging clusters of dates. رسول الله ﷺ b started eating from it, and he (Ali) joined him. رسول الله ﷺ b then said to him:

"You are still recuperating, until ‘Ali stopped eating.' I then made some barley with chard and brought it to them. النبي ﷺ b said, to 'Ali 'Eat from this: this more beneficial for you.”

Silgh is hot and dry in the first degree and has a soothing coofness in it. Chard In addition decomposes and opens the clogs. The black chard constipates and helps against alopecia (A skin disease characterized by loss of hair, partial or total), spots, dandruff and warts if its water is used as ointment. It In addition kills lice and is used as ointment when blended with honey to cure herpes. Silgh In addition opens the clogs in the liver and spleen.

The black chard constipates as we have stated, especially when taken with lentils, both of which are not

suitable for the stomach. However, white chard with lentils softens the stomach and is used as a laxative and is used to treat hemiplegia (Paralysis affecting only one side of the body), when blended with food aliments and condiments. Yet, it is not nutritious, produces harmful mixtures and burns the blood. Eating it with vinegar and mustard helps neutralize these side effects. Finally, eating it excessively causes constipation and flatulence.

The Letter Shin 1. Shuneiz (The Black Seed)

We talked about the Black Seed before under the letter "Hoo.

Al-Tirmidhi and Ibn Majah narrated that رسول الله ﷺ b asked Asma' bint 'Umais

"How do you treat constipation? She said. ‘with Shubrum'. النبي ﷺ its said, 'Hot and too strong of a laxative."

Shubrum is a small tree that sometimes grows to be as tall as a man. The Shubrum has red branches with some whiteness, while the tips of its branches end with a cluster of leaves, Shubrum flowers are small and

yellowish with some whiteness. When its flowers they fall small stems that have small grains and which look like terebinth replace them. The color of these stems is reddish and has red peels that cover its ribs. The parts of the Shubrum that are used are its peels, ribs and stem extract,

Shubrum is hot and dry in the fourth degree and drives away the black bile, yellow water and phlegm. It In addition causes nausea and distress. Using it in excessive amounts might even case death. When intending to use the Shubrum, it should first be soaked in milk for a day and a night, and the milk should be changed twice or thrice during the day. Then, the Shubrum should be dried in the shadow, blended with roses, tragacanth (In addition known as goats' horn), and then consumed with honey water or grape juice.

Two to four small measures of the Shubrum constitute one dose. We should state that Hunain said, "As for Shubrum milk, I do not see any goodness in it and thus do not recommend it. Common doctors have killed many people with it."

Ibn Majah narrated that "Aishah said: "When a member of the family of رسول الله ﷺ b would fall sick, he would order that barley soup is made and then the ill person wouid be commanded to have some of it. He

——— The Prophetic Medicine

used to say, 'It strengthens the heart of the sad person and relieves the heart of the ill person, just as one of you would wash the dirt off of her face with water.’ "

We mentioned that the remedy mentioned in this الحديث entails boiled barley water which is more nutritious than its flour. Barley water helps against coughing and throat roughness, relieves the irritant excess excrement, produces more urine, cleanses the stomach, quenches the thirst and extinguishes heat. It In addition provides comfort and has a decomposing quality.

This remedy entails preparing a portion of a good type of barley and five times as much water, placing them in a clean pot and cooking them under moderate temperature until only two fifths of the mixture remains in the pot. The resulting soup is then purified and used as much as needed.

4. Shown (Roasted Meat)

الله said that when Prophet Ibrahim had the honorable guests:

"And he hastened to entertain them with a roasted calf." (I 1:69) Ibrahim had roasted the calf on heated stones.

Al-Tirmidhi narrated that Umm Salamah said that

she once brought النبي ﷺ s& a roasted piece of meat and that he ate from it and then stood up to pray without repeating the ablution. Al-Tirmidhi then commented that this /adith is authentic. Al-Tirmidhi In addition narrated that Abdullah bin AI-Harith said, "We ate some roasted meat with رسول الله ﷺ as inside the mosque." Further, Al-Tirmidhi narrated that Al-Mughirah bin Shu'bah said, "I was a guest of رسول الله ﷺ b one night and he ordered that a piece of meat be roasted and then took the blade and started to cut pieces of it for me. Then, Bilal came to make the call to prayer and النبي ﷺ s& dropped the blade and said, 'What is the matter with him?"

The best type of roast is the meat of a one-year old sheep, then a fat sheep. This type of food is hot and wet, produces black bile, but is one of the most nutritious foods for healthy, ill and recovering persons alike. Cooked meat is better, lighter on the stomach and has more wetness. Fried meat is less beneficial while meat dried in the sun is the worst kind. In addition, roasting meat on burning stones is better than flame broiled meats.

5. Sha'hm (Fat or Grease)

In Al-Musnad it is narrated that Anas said that a Jewish man asked النبي ﷺ ste to be his guest and that he offered him some barley bread and melted grease.

——— The Prophetic Medicine

In the Sahih it is In addition narrated that Abdullah bin Mughaffal said, "On the Day of Khaibar, a bag full of grease was lowered and | took possession of it and said, 'By الله! I will not give anyone any of it!' When I tured around | found that رسول الله ﷺ “ was laughing and did not comment.'"
